text: Aaj subah MNC se layoff ka termination email padhte hi mere seene mein ek bhayankar jakdan aur ghutan shuru ho gayi hai. Sasu-maa pehle hi taana maarti thi ki sarkari naukri nahi lagi, aur ab is private job ke jaane se mere dimaag ki nasein fatne ko ho rahi hain. Mere hath-pair thande pad gaye hain aur gala itna sookh gaya hai ki subah ka nashta tak nigla nahi ja raha.

Startup se nikalne ki khabar milte hi mere kandhon aur peeth mein ek aisi aithan shuru ho gayi hai jo rukne ka naam nahi le rahi. Ghar ki EMI aur bacchon ki school fees ka bojh hai, aur is dual burden ke beech mere sar mein itna bhari dard hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai. Mujhe lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur poora jism dard se buri tarah toot raha hai.

Subah email padh kar mere pet mein aisi marod uthi hai ki main rasoi ka kaam bhi nahi kar pa rahi hoon. Papa ne kisan hokar apni jama-pungi meri coaching mein lagayi thi, aur ab ye layoff sunkar mere gale mein ek ajeeb sa gola phans gaya hai jisse saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai. Mere ghutne dard se kaanp rahe hain aur pure badan mein ek aisi jalan phail rahi hai jaise bukhar chadh raha ho.

Private company se termination ka mail dekhte hi mere dimaag mein ek zor ki seeti bajne lagi aur mera poora chehra bilkul sunn pad gaya. Pehle hi sarkari naukri fail hone ka darr tha, aur ab ye naukri chali gayi toh mere hatho ki ungliyan thar-thara rahi hain. Mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lagta hai seena cheer kar bahar aa jayegi, aur mujhe lagatar ghabrahat ki wajah se paseena aa raha hai.

Layoff ki news sunte hi mere pairon tale zameen nikal gayi aur tabhi se meri peeth mein ek ajeeb sa bhari-pan mehsus ho raha hai. Kirana shop chalane wale sasural mein sabko badi umeed thi, par ab is nakami ke baad mere dimaag mein aisi thakan chha gayi hai ki main ek kadam bhi nahi chal pa rahi. Meri aawaz bilkul baith gayi hai aur lag raha hai jaise mera poora physical system collapse hone wala hai.
